description: Negative fixture cases for the stable boundary manifest gate. Each case is a complete manifest that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_stable_boundary_manifest.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id. These cases keep the per-value-line narrowing and packet-freshness-SLO rejections honest even if the canonical manifest changes shape.

cases.summary: A value-line row whose boundary state forces narrowing still publishes a Stable lifecycle label instead of narrowing below the cutline.
A published value-line row rides a proof packet whose freshness-SLO state is breached, so the packet-freshness automation must narrow it before publication.
